rulings.Case Title: BOYD VS AGUILAR
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn To Be Relieved As Counsel
rulings.Rulings: PLAINTIFF STEPHEN BOYD, Mtn To Be Relieved As Counsel GRANTED,IF MOVING PARTY CAN PROVIDE TIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE, NO OPPOSITION FILED, OTHERWISE OFF CALENDAR.(302/PA/JU)

rulings.Case Title: PHILIPP VS CCSF, MJM BREATIVE SERVICES
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT SMG, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT 1.)MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT-DENIED.2.)MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO CLAIM FOR NEGLIGENT MAINTENANCE DENIED.DEFENDANT DID NOT SHOW THAT ITS GENERAL CATEGORY OF NEGLIGENT CONDUCT WAS NOT SUFFICIENTLY LIKELY TO RESULT IN HARM EXPERIENCED.3.) MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO CLAIM FOR FAILURE TO WARM OF DANGEROUS CONDITION DENIED.DEFENDANT FAILED TO ESTABLISH THAT IT DID NOT HAVE A DUTY TO WARN.4.)MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO OWNERSHIP OF POSTERITY ON WHICH A DANGEROUS CONDITIONS EXISTED DENIED.FAILURE TO SHOW THAT THE CIRCUIT BREAKERS AND LIGHTING PANELS WER NOT IN DANGEROUS CONDITION.(302/PA/AA)
